changes.description: Baseline run with original verbose skill content

Replaced skill with a concise version containing a complete copy-paste-ready Python greedy scheduler script. Removed pseudocode and abstract explanations. Added explicit step-by-step instructions (read, write script, run, verify). The model previously failed job-makespan by attempting a complex priority-queue approach that hit bugs and context overflow. The new skill guides it to use a simple sequential greedy algorithm that processes jobs one at a time.
